title: Dogs breakdancing in NYC (Remix!) 🎶
prompt_text: A vibrant, high-energy street performance scene set in a bustling urban plaza resembling Times Square, New York, filled with bright digital billboards and city lights. On a large sheet of cardboard laid out on the pavement, two dogs dressed in streetwear are engaging in a breakdancing battle. The dog on the left is a stout, tan and white Bulldog wearing a black hoodie, while the dog on the right is a lean, black and tan mixed breed wearing a blue shirt. Behind them sits a retro silver boombox and a handwritten cardboard sign. A semi-circle of spectators, dressed in heavy winter coats, beanies, and scarves, watches enthusiastically, with many holding up smartphones to record the spectacle.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A vibrant, high-energy street performance scene set in a bustling urban plaza resembling Times Square, New York, filled with bright digital billboards and city lights. On a large sheet of cardboard laid out on the pavement, two dogs dressed in streetwear are engaging in a breakdancing battle. The dog on the left is a stout, tan and white Bulldog wearing a black hoodie, while the dog on the right is a lean, black and tan mixed breed wearing a blue shirt. Behind them sits a retro silver boombox and a handwritten cardboard sign. A semi-circle of spectators, dressed in heavy winter coats, beanies, and scarves, watches enthusiastically, with many holding up smartphones to record the spectacle.

cinematography.mood: Humorous, energetic, and entertaining, capturing a viral social media video aesthetic.
cinematography.cameraShot: Medium-wide shot, slightly high angle, with a handheld camera feel that stays focused on the cardboard dance floor.

actions: The Bulldog on the left spins low to the ground on its side.
The black and tan dog on the right stands upright on its hind legs, hopping rhythmically.
The black and tan dog drops to the cardboard and performs an impressive breakdance backspin (windmill move), rotating rapidly on its back.
The crowd in the background claps in rhythm and cheers, pointing phones at the dogs.
dialogue: [Music: Upbeat, old-school funk/breakbeat track playing loudly]
[Sound of rhythmic clapping from the audience]
